overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The camera moves along wet streets lined with towering skyscrapers, neon advertisements, and palm trees, crossing intersections with futuristic traffic and pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas. High-quality game engine footage with ray-traced reflections and vibrant neon lighting typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

events.description: camera tilts down from bright sky to shadowed street level with neon lighting
passing large digital billboard displaying animated advertisement

agents.ego_description: walking along covered sidewalk, passing palm trees and illuminated advertisements on the left

large illuminated advertisement screen showing animated content with neon colors
tropical palm tree in concrete planter on the sidewalk edge
rectangular planter containing broad-leaf tropical vegetation
elevated walkway connecting buildings with green neon trim and glass sides

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a view looking up at towering skyscrapers against a bright sky, then tilts down to street level revealing a wet, neon-lit sidewalk. The camera walks forward along a covered pedestrian path lined with palm trees, tropical planters, and large digital billboards displaying advertisements. The environment is sheltered from weather by building overhangs, with sparse pedestrian traffic visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated pedestrian crosswalk with holographic ground signals

events.description: steps from covered sidewalk onto open intersection with glowing crosswalk markings
white futuristic sedan drives past on the right side of the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection following glowing green WALK signals projected on the ground

notable_agents.action: woman walking with a purple glowing illuminated umbrella
white futuristic sedan with streamlined design driving through intersection

entered.detail: illuminated yellow-striped crosswalk with green glowing WALK text and directional arrows
large metal truss structure spanning the intersection with hanging traffic signals

segments.scene_description: Leaving the covered sidewalk, the scene opens into a wide intersection with glowing crosswalk markings on the wet asphalt. The camera crosses the street following green illuminated WALK signals projected on the ground, while futuristic vehicles pass by on the right. Pedestrians with glowing umbrellas walk ahead, and the overhead traffic framework looms above the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy multi-lane intersection with futuristic vehicle traffic

events.description: black off-road truck drives across the crosswalk from left to right
crosswalk signal changes from green WALK to red WAIT with X symbols
blue sports car followed by yellow muscle car speed through the intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing across the wide intersection while navigating between passing futuristic vehicles

notable_agents.action: black rugged off-road truck with large tires driving across the crosswalk
yellow futuristic muscle car with black racing stripes accelerating through the intersection

entered.detail: tall dark skyscraper with illuminated windows and geometric architectural patterns

segments.scene_description: The camera continues crossing the expansive intersection as various futuristic vehicles pass through, including a black off-road truck and colorful sports cars. The crosswalk signals change from green to red during the crossing. The environment remains open and exposed, surrounded by towering modern buildings with illuminated facades and overhead traffic structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy sidewalk with neon storefronts and pedestrians with illuminated accessories

events.description: reaches opposite sidewalk and merges with crowd of pedestrians
camera turns to look up at building facade with large SOFTSYS signage

agents.ego_description: walking along crowded sidewalk passing pedestrians with glowing umbrellas and futuristic clothing

notable_agents.action: man in black suit standing and observing the street traffic
person carrying a bright green glowing illuminated umbrella walking toward camera

entered.detail: tall building with large teal illuminated signage reading SOFTSYS near the top
bright orange illuminated awning extending over the sidewalk from storefront
modern building with transparent glass facade and internal lighting visible

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera walks along the opposite sidewalk where crowds of pedestrians gather, some carrying glowing neon umbrellas in green and purple. The street features vibrant orange neon awnings and the prominent SOFTSYS building sign. The camera briefly turns to look up at the towering architecture before continuing down the wet, reflective sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered, neon-lit pedestrian walkway into a wide, exposed futuristic intersection and across to a crowded city sidewalk. It begins by tilting down from towering skyscrapers to a wet sidewalk, moving forward along a covered path lined with palm trees and digital billboards. As the camera leaves the shelter of the building overhangs, the scene opens into a vast intersection where the camera follows green illuminated walk signals across wet asphalt while futuristic vehicles pass by. The movement continues through the expansive crossing as the signals shift from green to red, surrounded by illuminated facades and overhead traffic structures. Finally, the camera reaches the opposite sidewalk, weaving through crowds of pedestrians with glowing neon umbrellas beneath vibrant orange awnings and the prominent SOFTSYS building sign.
